steps.title: Isolate w
steps.content: Undo the addition by subtracting $7$ from both sides of $w+7=357$: $$w=357-7.$$

steps.title: Solve
steps.content: Compute: $w=350$. That matches choice B — B is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice B is correct. Subtracting $7$ from each side of the given equation yields $w=350$. Therefore, the value of $w$ that is the solution to the given equation is $350$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is incorrect. This is the value of $w$ that is the solution to the equation $7w=357$, not $w+7=357$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice C is incorrect. This is the value of $w$ that is the solution to the equation $w-7=357$, not $w+7=357$.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is incorrect and may result from conceptual or calculation errors.
